_comment: JobLine AI — Self-Hosted / ITAR Deployment Config Template
_instructions: 1. Copy this file to %APPDATA%\JobLine AI\config.json (Windows) or ~/Library/Application Support/JobLine AI/config.json (macOS)
2. Replace all YOUR_* placeholders with your actual values
3. Ensure your self-hosted Supabase instance is running in a US-controlled region
4. Ensure your self-hosted web app is accessible at appUrl from all end-user machines
5. Delete the _comment and _instructions keys before deploying
